description: Ne Amendments Offered by the Committee Broussard of Louisiana Voted With the MajorityCommittee Sent a Report With the Measure Renew ing Reasons for the Proposed Re adjustment of the Schedules WASHINGTON March 18The house committee on ways and means agreed to day after the flrst meeting of the full committee to report the Payne tariff bill back to the house without amendment The Democrats were given until next Tuesday to prepare a minority report Mr Broussard of Louisiana voted to ireport the bill without amendment but all the other Democratic members of the committee voted against it The vote was thirteen to six Immediately after the house convened Mr Payne of New York chairman of the committee on ways and means reported back the tariff bill without amendment Mr Payne offered a resolution provid ing for the printing of 30000 copies of it 125000 of which shall be in document form land embodying the views of the minority Atter a good deal of discussion the reso i lutlon was adopted The report accompanying the bill which was presented by Mr Payne is imade up in the main of extracts from ithe statement regarding the schedules iwhioh was yesterday given out
